name: The Asteroid Belt's Trial
short_description: Welcome to the Asteroid Belt's Trial! In this game you are an intergalactic space traveler caught in the middle of an asteroid field, who must avoid and destroy the meteors that come into orbit in order to make your way home. Inspired by old-school arcade space shooters.
detailed_description:
VERSION 1.1 NOW LIVE

Thank you to everyone who has supported this game thus far! I have made some adjustments that will hopefully make the game feel smoother and more fun to play! These changes include:

Added and readjusted controls
-Holding up now causes ship to go faster.
-Holding down now cause ship to go slower.
-Turning radius is now sharper

Increased Bomb Count to 4
Default Highscore set to 50,000
Adjusted Game Visuals
Adjusted Game Balance
Adjusted Audio Levels
Added Developer's Logo Screen

Again thank you all so much for your support!

-Bobby


About the Game

WELCOME TO THE ULTIMATE TRIAL OF THE UNIVERSE!

Welcome Space Traveler! It seems you have found yourself caught in the middle of an meteor storm. Now you must face The Asteroid Belt's Trial and try your best to survive.

Chip away at meteors with your ship's infinite amount of ammo, or blow them out of this galaxy completely with your limited set of bombs! You gain points for destroying meteors and landing on small moons that occasionally come into orbit. However, the longer you stay on a moon, the more points you will lose. You will also lose points for accidentally destroying moons instead of meteors, so be careful.

Try your best to both beat the game and the highscore. Doing this will unlock the "NEW GAME PLUS" mode! A challenge for those who have proven themselves and wish to put their skills to the test.

(Developer's Tip: You will gain an extra life at 25000 points)

GOOD LUCK SPACE TRAVELER!

(Note: While the ship may look small in the screenshots, the game is meant to be played in full screen which gives you a much better view of the action!)

30+ ACHIEVEMENTS!
